name: powermem-vscode
description: PowerMem intelligent memory for AI assistants: connect Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Windsurf to PowerMem with one click.

chatParticipants.name: powermem
chatParticipants.description: Memory for AI (optional). In seamless mode use your linked AI instead; no need to @ mention.

disambiguation.description: The user wants to save something to long-term memory (PowerMem) or search their saved memories.
examples: Save to memory: we use pnpm in this project

enumDescriptions: HTTP mode: AI tools fetch memories via HTTP context endpoints. Use when MCP is not available or you prefer a simpler setup.
MCP mode: AI tools connect via MCP (Model Context Protocol). Recommended for Cursor, Claude Code, etc. You can use remote MCP (backend URL /mcp) or local MCP (set MCP Server Path).
powermem.connectionMode.description: Connection mode: HTTP or MCP. Determines how AI tools (Cursor, Claude Code, etc.) connect to PowerMem.

powermem.backendUrl.description: PowerMem server address. HTTP mode: used as the API base URL. MCP mode: used as the MCP root (e.g. {backendUrl}/mcp if MCP Server Path is empty).

powermem.apiKey.description: API key for PowerMem (X-API-Key header). Leave empty if your server does not require auth.

powermem.useMCP.description: Deprecated: use "Connection Mode" instead. When false, same as HTTP mode; when true, same as MCP mode.

powermem.mcpServerPath.description: MCP mode only. Leave empty to use remote MCP at Backend URL + /mcp. Set a path/command (e.g. uvx) to use a local MCP server process instead.

powermem.userId.description: Custom user ID for memory scope. Leave empty to auto-generate.

powermem.projectName.description: Custom project name. Leave empty to use the workspace name.

powermem.seamlessMode.description: Zero-friction mode: no need to use @powermem. Memory is automatic: linked AI (Cursor/Claude/Codex) get retrieval via MCP; optional file auto-capture adds content on save. Disable to use @powermem chat commands (remember/save/search).

powermem.autoCapture.onSave.description: When enabled, automatically add file content to memory on save (seamless write). In seamless mode, defaults to true unless set explicitly. Respects 'Include pattern' and 'Max chars'.

powermem.autoCapture.include.description: Glob pattern for which files to auto-capture on save (comma-separated). Example: **/*.md,**/docs/**

powermem.autoCapture.maxChars.description: Max characters per file to add to memory on auto-capture (avoids huge payloads).

powermem.chat.autoSummarizeEveryNTurns.description: In @powermem chat: auto-summarize and save to memory every N conversation turns (0 = off). Seamless write.

powermem.chat.autoRetrieve.description: In @powermem chat: always retrieve relevant memories before answering. Seamless retrieval.
